vibe: Spreadsheet-like, pragmatic, highly functional, information-dense, accountant-facing

rules: Use IBM Plex Mono (or similar monospaced font) for all financial figures, dates, and alphanumeric ID codes to ensure vertical alignment.
Never center-align tabular data. Text aligns left, Numbers align right.
Headings should remain compact; do not exceed text-3xl. Focus is on utility over display.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
rules: Maximize screen real estate. Use tight padding (p-2, p-3) for table cells and dense lists.
Containers must use sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm max) and 1px solid borders.
Zero drop shadows. UI hierarchy is established through border weight (1px vs 2px) and background fill (white vs light gray).
Dashboard summary cards should sit tightly together with gap-4 or gap-0 (border-collapse style).

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-950 text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-zinc-800
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-zinc-900 border border-zinc-300 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-zinc-100
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-600 hover:text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-100 rounded-sm px-3 py-1.5

tables.style: Spreadsheet style. 1px solid grid lines (border-border). No zebra striping by default.
tables.header: Sticky header, bg-zinc-50, text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-zinc-500 border-b-2 border-zinc-200.
tables.interaction: Hover-only row actions to reduce visual clutter. Hover state on row: bg-zinc-50.

cards.status_indicator: For status-driven cards (e.g., Missing Documents), use a 3px left-border of the semantic color (red for critical).

forms.style: Dense, inline or 2-column layouts for figures. Shadcn inputs with rounded-sm, border-zinc-300.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute using kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='upload-evidence-button', data-testid='evidence-register-table').

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an accountant-facing productivity tool. It must feel highly trustworthy, extremely fast, and completely devoid of unnecessary decorative flair.
Prioritize the Evidence Register: It must be a dense, robust data table. Implement sticky headers and ensure columns don't stretch unnecessarily.
Override default Shadcn component radii to `rounded-sm` or `rounded-none`. Remove default box-shadows.
Manual Figure Entry form should support fast keyboard navigation (Tab key workflow).
Missing Evidence Tracker should use color sparingly—only to highlight priority levels (Critical = Red, Important = Amber).
Ensure the Google Drive OAuth flow is treated as a utilitarian connection step (clear status text, simple button), not a massive marketing module.
